bundles.name: Matinee Snack Saver
bundles.description: 1 adult matinee ticket plus a small popcorn and soft drink at a special daytime price.

bundles.name: Standard 2D Ticket
bundles.description: One standard adult ticket for any regular 2D screening.

bundles.name: Premium IMAX Experience
bundles.description: One adult ticket for an IMAX screening with premium seating.

bundles.name: Family Feast Combo
bundles.description: 2 adult tickets, 2 child tickets, 1 large popcorn and 2 large soft drinks.

bundles.name: Classic Snack Pack
bundles.description: Large popcorn and medium soft drink, no ticket included.

genres.name: Action
genres.description: High-energy films featuring fights, chases, and intense set pieces.

genres.name: Family
genres.description: Movies suitable for all ages, focusing on themes kids and parents can enjoy together.

genres.name: Animation
genres.description: Animated features and shorts created with CGI, hand-drawn, or stop-motion techniques.

genres.name: Comedy
genres.description: Light-hearted movies designed to amuse and entertain with humor.

genres.name: Drama
genres.description: Character-driven stories focusing on emotional themes and realistic conflicts.

genres.name: Thriller
genres.description: Suspenseful movies that keep viewers on the edge of their seats.

genres.name: Sci-Fi
genres.description: Science fiction exploring futuristic concepts, technology, and space travel.

genres.name: Crime
genres.description: Stories centered on heists, investigations, and the criminal underworld.

movies.title: Galaxy Warriors
movies.synopsis: An elite squad of misfit pilots must unite to defend a distant galaxy from an ancient robotic armada.

movies.title: Midnight Heist
movies.synopsis: A team of master thieves attempts an impossible bank robbery that can only be executed during a total blackout.

movies.title: Sunny Days
movies.synopsis: A single dad and his daughter embark on a summer road trip that changes the way they see each other and the world.

movies.title: Wonder Paws
movies.synopsis: A shy kid discovers a team of talking rescue animals who help him save his hometown park.

movies.title: Echoes of Tomorrow
movies.synopsis: A brilliant physicist confronts alternate versions of her life after an experiment fractures time itself.

movies.title: Shadow Protocol
movies.synopsis: An ex-intelligence officer uncovers a global conspiracy when a secret program goes rogue.

movies.title: Neon Blitz
movies.synopsis: In a neon-drenched future city, an undercover cop infiltrates an illegal hover-racing league.

movies.title: Skyline Siege
movies.synopsis: A retired pilot returns to the skies when mercenaries hijack an airborne luxury hotel.

movies.title: Summer Melodies
movies.synopsis: A group of teens forms a band to save their community music center before it closes for good.

movies.title: Pixel Racers
movies.synopsis: A young gamer finds himself pulled into his favorite retro racing game and must win to get home.

movies.title: Haunted Harbor
movies.synopsis: A skeptical journalist investigates a seaside town where ships vanish under mysterious circumstances.

movies.title: Lunar Blossoms
movies.synopsis: Two strangers meet every full moon at the same café and slowly uncover a shared secret.

movies.title: Code of Honor
movies.synopsis: A cybersecurity expert races to stop a digital heist targeting the world's largest stock exchange.

movies.title: Crimson Ballad
movies.synopsis: A singer-songwriter revisits her hometown to confront the night that changed her life forever.

movies.title: Tiny Titans
movies.synopsis: Four toy figurines come to life and team up to protect a child from a neighborhood bully.

movies.title: Winter Legends
movies.synopsis: An aging mountaineer shares the true story behind a legendary expedition gone wrong.

movies.title: Festival of Lights
movies.synopsis: Three neighboring families overcome their differences while preparing for a citywide lantern festival.

movies.title: Midday Musings
movies.synopsis: Over the course of a single lunch hour, strangers in a city park make choices that alter their lives.

movies.title: Broken Circuits
movies.synopsis: An android detective searches for the programmer who implanted him with forbidden memories.

people.name: Ava Thompson
people.bio: Ava Thompson is an award-winning actor known for her emotionally nuanced performances in science fiction and drama films.

people.name: Liam Kim
people.bio: Liam Kim is a Korean-American director celebrated for visually inventive action movies with strong character arcs.

people.name: Sofia Martinez
people.bio: Sofia Martinez is a Spanish cinematographer whose work spans thrillers, romances, and art-house dramas.

people.name: Noah Jackson
people.bio: Noah Jackson is a character actor recognized for his roles as complex antagonists in crime and thriller films.

people.name: Emily Chen
people.bio: Emily Chen is a writer-director known for heartfelt family movies and coming-of-age stories.

people.name: Oliver Schmidt
people.bio: Oliver Schmidt is a German composer who has scored numerous sci-fi and fantasy films.

people.name: Mia Rodriguez
people.bio: Mia Rodriguez is an animator and director specializing in colorful family and adventure animations.

people.name: Daniel Iyer
people.bio: Daniel Iyer is a British-Indian actor noted for his versatility across comedy, drama, and genre films.

people.name: Chloe Dubois
people.bio: Chloe Dubois is a French editor acclaimed for her precise pacing in thrillers and heist films.

people.name: Benjamin Cooper
people.bio: Benjamin Cooper is an American producer who has worked on several blockbuster action franchises.

people.name: Haruto Tanaka
people.bio: Haruto Tanaka is a Japanese actor and stunt performer known for high-intensity action roles.

people.name: Fatima Khan
people.bio: Fatima Khan is a Pakistani screenwriter whose work focuses on family-friendly stories with global appeal.
